name: Raim
description: Raim is one of the prestigious professors at Babyls Demon School. She is a succubus teacher who teaches an all girls-only class for seduction. Due to being a succubus, Raim is one of the most provocatively erotically acting characters. She's very proud as a teacher and encourages her students and their sexiness. However, she can be shocked easily by her student's lack of sexiness, so much that when her student Clara only had a 2% sexiness, Raim was so shocked she focused most of her time on Clar
mediaTitles: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 3
searchTerms: Welcome to Demon School! Iruma-kun Season 3

name: Reiji Kirio
description: A corporate drone who wakes up in another world with the "Medicine Making" skill.
mediaTitles: Drug Store in Another World - The Slow Life of a Cheat Pharmacist
Drugstore in Another World: The Slow Life of a Cheat Pharmacist
Drugstore in Another World: The Slow Life of a Cheat Pharmacist
searchTerms: Drug Store in Another World - The Slow Life of a Cheat Pharmacist
Drugstore in Another World: The Slow Life of a Cheat Pharmacist

name: Reiko Kuchiba
description: A cold, businesslike sniper who carries out assassinations on any target, good or bad. ~!Her mission was to kill Satori Hyoue. At the end of the Murder Party, she is successful in sniping and ultimately killing him.!~

name: Ren Ekoda
description: She's a girl, but she has a troubling condition where females of any species are indiscriminately attracted to her. She plays the "straight man" to her childhood friend Hibiki. She always has very little energy and finds most things bothersome. If given the chance, she will take a nap.

name: Ren Saionji
description: Ren Saionji is the daughter of the family that main character, Kanata Rivington moves in with. She is the main female protagonist and has had feelings for Kanata since the day they met, even though she didn't believe in such a thing as "love at first sight".

name: Rinne Sonogami
description: Codename: Ruler Rinne is a pink-haired spirit and one of the characters in season 3 of Date a Live. She appeared in season 3 of the series, Shidou went back in time to check back the time when Phantom gave the Sephira to Origami. Phantom then took over the appearance of a pink-haired girl that Shidou felt familiar with. Rinne's supposed appearance was actually Phantom in disguise since Shidou was not yet allowed to know who Phantom actually was. She appeared in the titular game that featured her

name: Riou Sonidori
description: Riou is a 5th grade elementary school student and member of Meikou Wind FSC. Son of Olympic silver medalist [Shinichirou Sonidori.](https://anilist.co/character/197159/Shinichirou-Sonidori)

name: Rita Mordio
description: __Height:__ 150cm __Occupation:__ Blastia Researcher __Weapon:__ Cloths and Whips __Sub-Weapon:__ Books Rita is the smartest mage residing in Aspio, the closed-off secluded city of scholars. Due to her last name being "Mordio" she was hunted down by Yuri, Repede, Estelle, and Karol, accused of stealing the Aque Blastia from the lower quarter of Zaphias. Orphaned at a young age, she is initially cold and has a poor social disposition. Karol acts as her punching bag, both literally and figurativel
mediaTitles: Tales of Vesperia: The First Strike
searchTerms: Tales of Vesperia: The First Strike

name: Rockman
description: The hero from the video games, created by Dr. Light. Originally created as a lab assistant named "Rock", he was modified for battle after Dr. Wily reprogrammed the original Robot Masters. Due to his Variable Weapons System, he can copy the weapon of any Robot Master he defeats in combat and use it as his own. (Source: Wikipedia)

name: Ryoko Koiso
description: The daughter of the Koiso-style kobujutsu karate master, initially set on fighting each and every high school delinquent, and convinced that Kitano is evil and very strong. After fighting him, however, she discovers his true nature, and little by little she becomes more or less his girlfriend.

name: Sadako
description: She is a ghost.

name: Satoru Toyama
description: [Iroha](https://anilist.co/character/323116/Iroha-Inukai)'s classmate and childhood friend. He has a rabbit named [Daifuku](https://anilist.co/character/326088/Daifuku), and hopes to be able to communicate with him one day. He is very good at studying and has a very kind and gentle personality. When he learns about the Precure, he assists them with his extensive knowledge about animals. He tends to become shy easily when it's about his crush on Iroha. ~!He later on becomes Iroha's boyfriend.!~
mediaTitles: Wonderful Precure! The Movie! Dokidoki♡Game no Sekai de Daibouken!
Kimi to Idol Precure♪ Omatase! Kimi ni Todokeru KirakkiLive!
searchTerms: Wonderful Precure! The Movie! Dokidoki♡Game no Sekai de Daibouken!
Kimi to Idol Precure♪ Omatase! Kimi ni Todokeru KirakkiLive!

name: Sayori Mizushima
description: __Heiight:__ 165 cm She is the Student Council's treasurer who is infamously known to be somewhat wicked and a miser, Sayo actually has a boyfriend who lives in the neighboring district. Due to her greed over the Student Council's budget, Sayo is fired from the council by Natsuo Maki, but she is later reinstated along with Yuiko Enomoto.

name: Shima Tateishi
description: **Height:** 147 cm (4'8") Chief Artillery Officer of the destroyer-class ship, Harekaze.

name: Shirley
description: Noritaka's assistant, who admires his work and looks forward to succeeding him. ~!She soon realizes that she cannot succeed Noritaka after her own flower withers. Instead, she places her faith in a young Kiritsugu. She drinks Noritaka's potion to prove it's validity, but it fails and turns her into a bloodthirsty Dead Apostle. Kiritsugu is presumably forced to kill her. !~

name: Sho Marufuji
description: Sho is a former Osiris, then Ra, and now Obelisk student as well as Judai's best friend. A decent duelist, though hindered by a great deal of self doubt, Sho's journey toward strengthening himself provides sharp contrast to protagonist Judai's active determination. Sho is often a "comic relief" character, partially due to him being very nervous a large portion of the time, in a sharp contrast to Judai's optimistic nature.

name: Shourei Nouzen
nativeName: ショーレイ・ノウゼン
description: Shinei's older brother. Rei was a generally friendly and reliable older brother, but he was not without his faults. ~!One night when he was on patrol, he came across a young Vladilena Milizé, who was taken by her father to see the injustices brought upon the Eighty-Six. Their helicopter had been shot by a Stachelschwein and was forced to land, leaving them vulnerable to an attack from a nearby Ameise. He took the only survivor, Lena, to his base and sent her back to inside the Gran Mur.!~
searchTerms: ショーレイ・ノウゼン

name: Shuu Sakurada
description: __Ability:__ Transporter Shuu is the second of the nine Sakurada children and the oldest son. He is twins with his sister Kanade. His ability makes him able to teleport him and anyone he touches to a certain location. Without realizing it, he has a crush on his childhood friend, Hana Satou. He ends up dating her, and she helps him with his campaigning program for the elections.

name: Sophie Hayter
mediaTitles: Once Upon a Witch's Death: The Tale of the One Thousand Tears of Joy
searchTerms: Once Upon a Witch's Death: The Tale of the One Thousand Tears of Joy

name: Sylvie
mediaTitles: The Beginning After the End Season 2
searchTerms: The Beginning After the End Season 2

name: Teruto Kurabe
description: Teruto Kurabe wants to defeat the king for reasons he has forgotten due to amnesia. He has a great obsession with bread. ~!It is later revealed that he is the brother of [Kikka](https://anilist.co/character/232541/Kikka), the current King of Neo Kyoto. !~

name: Timcanpy
description: Timcampy is General Cross' golem and travels with Allen. The extent of Timcampy's capabilities are unknown but it does seem to be able to perform the functions of normal golems. It is known that Timcampy is capable of growing to an enormous size and shrinking at will, and has a mouth that can act like a projecter of anything he has witnessed.

name: Tokage
description: Member of the Mayonaka Punch channel who loves gambling and money. She is a wild and free person who often causes problems for others.
